body: Cute place if you enjoy waiting twelve minutes to be ignored by someone wearing seven silver rings. Flat white was fine. The real product here is being seen with a laptop.
Looks like every other renovated pub until the woman behind the bar remembers your order from last week and suddenly the whole room feels less rented.
Guy behind the counter clocked that I was having a terrible day and handed me the cold bottle from the back fridge without asking. More emotional intelligence than my last three dates.
Every table is babies, oat flat whites, and one man correcting someone's German. Efficient way to remember you are either under-rested or overinvested in this city.
The line looks like a small housing crisis but moves fast. Best move is to go when the fog is still deciding what kind of day it is.
Everyone in here is either on a founder call or pretending not to be. Six dollar drip and somehow the staff still have to ask if you want to add a gratitude shot.
Same tiny coffee, same old man already arguing about football, same five minutes where you can believe routine is stronger than rent.
Perfect place to watch twelve people cosplay moving to Barcelona for six months. Food fine, prices targeted at people who say barrio like they invented the word.
